rationale_top3: ['Outstanding entertainment facilities (25/25) - Exceptional water park with multiple slides that rivals nearby theme parks, keeping children entertained for entire stays', 'Exemplary cleanliness standards (15/15) - Immaculate amenities and spotless facilities consistently maintained throughout the park', "Maximum sentiment score (15/15) - Guests describe it as the best caravan park they've stayed at, with legendary staff service and welcoming atmosphere"]
rationale_honourable: ['Strong nature integration (13/15) - Well-landscaped grounds balancing resort amenities with green spaces', 'Ideal location proximity (5/5) - Close to all major Gold Coast theme parks while maintaining a peaceful retreat atmosphere', 'Pet-friendly excellence (5/5) - Comprehensive dog facilities including daycare, wash stations, and off-leash areas']
water_fun: Heated waterpark with multiple slides, resort pool
kids_play: Jumping pillow, playground, flying fox, daily activities
pet_detail: Dog-friendly with onsite doggy daycare, dog wash facilities, large off-leash dog park, and dogs welcome at Nibbles Café
best_for: This park is perfect for active families with children aged 2-12 who want a full entertainment experience without leaving the park, combined with easy access to theme parks and attractions

rationale_top3: ['Entertainment excellence with 21/25 points - exceptional activity program including kids disco nights, movie nights, free pancake breakfasts, and extensive play facilities that keep children engaged throughout their stay', 'Outstanding cleanliness standards with 15/15 points - amenities spotlessly maintained with cleaning conducted at least 3 times daily, consistently praised across reviews', 'Strong sentiment score of 14/15 points reflecting loyal customer base with families returning for over 22 years, supported by wonderful and extremely helpful staff']
rationale_honourable: ['Premium nature setting with 13/15 points for direct Broadwater beach access and waterfront positioning', 'Good value proposition with 7/10 points considering the extensive facilities and entertainment program included']
water_fun: Two heated pools, direct Broadwater beach access
kids_play: Huge jumping pillow, playground, games room activities
best_for: Families with young children who value cleanliness, organized activities, and a friendly community atmosphere combined with waterfront location and proximity to Gold Coast theme parks

rationale_top3: ['Exceptional waterfront location directly on Tallebudgera Creek with safe swimming areas and short walk to beach access', 'Outstanding family entertainment facilities including heated pool with fun slides, adults-only pool, and diverse water activity options', 'High cleanliness standards and positive guest sentiment with friendly staff and well-maintained amenities']
rationale_honourable: ['Convenient proximity to Burleigh Heads and Gold Coast attractions', 'Good site sizing for family camping needs', 'Reasonable value proposition with on-site food truck and holiday activities']

kids_play: Playground, pool slides, trike hire, holiday activities
pet_detail: Not pet friendly - no dogs allowed
best_for: Best for families with children who prioritize location and water activities over modern cabin amenities, and don't mind a bustling atmosphere during peak seasons

park_name: NRMA Treasure Island Holiday Resort, Gold Coast
